news.summary: In New York, Surgimate, a prominent provider of surgical coordination and scheduling software in the United States, has named Jessica Cook as its Chief Revenue Officer. This newly established role will be responsible for leading all sales and marketing initiatives for Surgimate's various business segments, which encompass surgical scheduling, medical device coordination, and patient access. Working alongside CEO Kraig Brown, Cook will play a key role in developing and executing growth-focused strategies for the company.
news.headline: Jessica Cook appointed as Chief Revenue Officer at Surgimate in the U.S., tasked with overseeing sales and marketing efforts.
Saudi Energy Minister Uncertain About Supply If Iranian Crude Stops

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 14.7%, with approximately 20.5 million people currently out of work. This surge in unemployment is a result of the ongoing economic challenges due to the pandemic, which has also led to a significant decrease in GDP by 4.8% in the first quarter of the year. The government has been implementing various measures to support businesses and individuals during this difficult time, including stimulus packages and unemployment benefits. Experts predict that it may take several years for the economy to fully recover from the impact of the pandemic.
news.headline: Major Russian steel company faces shutdown risk due to economic slowdown.

news.summary: In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, Iron Mountain (NYSE: IRM) disclosed progress on its newly acquired contract from the U.S. Department of the Treasury. The company has begun operations under the agreement, focusing on digitizing documents and utilizing its advanced intelligent digitization technology. Recently, the U.S. Department of the Treasury released a Request for Quotations (RFQ) for a significant long-term project, indicating the substantial scope of the collaboration.
news.headline: Iron Mountain gets US Treasury contract, starts digitizing documents using proprietary solution, per update.

news.summary: A technology company named Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc. will present its TPGen robotic solution at Automatica 2025 in Munich, Germany from June 24-27, 2025. Grid Dynamics specializes in technology consulting, platform and product engineering, AI, and digital-engagement services. The event is known as the world's top gathering for smart automation and robotics. The company's stock symbol is Nasdaq: GDYN.
news.headline: Grid Dynamics to present robotic inspection solution TPGen at Automatica 2025 in Munich, Germany June 24-27.

news.summary: A report titled "Carrier-neutral Operator Market Review, 4Q24: GenAI Hype Speeds Up Private Equity's Push into Sector" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report analyzes the growth and progress of the carrier-neutral network operator (CNNO) market, examining financial statistics for 47 CNNOs worldwide from 1Q11 to 4Q24. In 2024, the companies studied in this report collectively generated $106.7 billion in revenue.
news.headline: "CNNO market report reviews growth of 47 operators, tracking financial stats from 1Q11 to 4Q24, reaching $106.7B revenue in 2024"

news.summary: The new report reveals that the economy added 250,000 jobs last month, resulting in an unemployment rate drop to 4%. Additionally, the stock market surged 2% following the announcement. This positive outlook has experts optimistic about future economic growth and stability.
news.headline: Leading Russian steel producer faces plant shutdowns amid economic slowdown.

news.summary: Globalstar (NASDAQ: GSAT) recently revealed their ongoing global collaboration with Technosylva, a key player in wildfire and extreme weather modeling and risk management. Technosylva offers integrated fire behavior modeling and incident management platforms utilized by fire agencies in North America, Latin America, and Europe. This partnership milestone represents the continued expansion of their cooperation to deliver advanced solutions to a wide geographic range of clients.
news.headline: Globalstar and Technosylva collaborate to support global wildfire response and firefighter safety with satellite-powered digital solutions.(Globalstar's NASDAQ: GSAT). Technosylva's platforms used by fire agencies across North America, Latin America, and Europe.

news.summary: The 18th SNEC PV Power Expo took place in Shanghai from June 11 to 13, 2025, drawing significant interest worldwide. Antaisolar presented its premier smart tracking system, AT-Spark, and a comprehensive selection of solar mounting solutions designed for rooftop installations.
news.headline: Antaisolar signs partnerships totalling over 2GW globally, introduces new smart tracker AT-Spark at SNEC 2025.

news.summary: US consumer demand remains strong with affluent Americans indicating intentions to increase spending and borrowing following the post-tariffs recovery in financial markets. This trend highlights a diverging outlook between income groups. The data suggests that higher-income households are more optimistic about their financial future, with plans to boost both spending and borrowing. This indicates a positive sentiment among wealthier Americans towards the economy, despite some uncertainties. The overall resilience in consumer demand is reflected in the increasing willingness of certain segments of the population to invest and consume, contributing to the post-tariffs revival in the financial markets.
news.headline: US consumer outlook varies by income: higher-income up, lower-income down. Post-tariffs boost financial market. Resilient demand overall.

news.summary: Rosenberg & Parker, the world's largest surety-only broker, has achieved another significant milestone with the expansion into the UK market. The company recently inaugurated a new office in London on June 19, 2025. This move comes in response to the growing need for specialized surety services, highlighting the increasing demand for expert guidance in this sector. The establishment of the R&P UK office reinforces the company's commitment to providing strategic solutions in the global surety market.
news.headline: Rosenberg & Parker, world's largest surety-only broker, opens UK office to meet increasing demand for global expansion.
Fahmy calls for diplomacy over force in latest interview; check out Bloomberg for more information.

news.summary: ZA Miner, a new cloud mining service, has launched a platform allowing users to mine popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin with no upfront cost or hardware. Regulated by the UK's Financial Conduct Authority, the platform offers a $100 starter mining contract to new users for free. With instant daily payouts and no hidden fees, ZA Miner aims to make crypto mining accessible and profitable for users globally. The service is designed for both beginners and experienced users, providing a sustainable infrastructure for passive income generation. For more details, the full article is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: ZA Miner launches zero-cost cloud mining platform; offers $100 free mining contract to start. Hassle-free crypto earning.

news.summary: On June 19, 2025 in New York City, Blockdaemon, a top institutional-grade blockchain infrastructure provider, revealed the introduction of their Earn Stack. This innovative product is created as a comprehensive solution for institutions to provide superior earn opportunities to their clients.
news.headline: Blockdaemon launches Earn Stack for institutions offering earn opportunities in staking & DeFi.

news.summary: In an effort to expand the Hedera Mobile Gaming Ecosystem, the Hedera Foundation has partnered with The Binary Holdings in Dubai, UAE. This collaboration, announced on June 19, 2025, aims to onboard a significant number of new users. The partnership will involve leveraging Web3 Distribution Infrastructure to facilitate the integration of these users into the ecosystem.
news.headline: Hedera Foundation partners with The Binary Holdings to onboard 169M+ users to mobile gaming ecosystem in Dubai, UAE.

news.summary: Aquila Power Catamarans, located in Clearwater, Florida, has revealed plans for the release of the Aquila 46 Yacht in September 2025. This new yacht will feature the popular "Explorer" design that has received acclaim for the Aquila 50 model. The Aquila 46 is set to join the company's range of vessels and is eagerly anticipated by both customers and the industry.
news.headline: Aquila Power Catamarans is launching the Aquila 46 Yacht in September 2025, with innovative design from the award-winning 50 model.

news.summary: Four partners have been selected to join the Inturai Channel Partner Program, and they are currently undergoing the onboarding process. This program is experiencing significant demand and acceptance, with partners focusing on global deployments in aged care and home security sectors. Investors can follow updates through (CSE: PPB / FSE: 3QG / US: PPBGF) investor@p2p-group.com.
news.headline: P2P Group launches global partner program (CSE: PPB / FSE: 3QG / US: PPBGF), onboarding 4 partners for initial deployment.

news.summary: Integra Connect has launched RCM Sphere, the latest revenue cycle management solution, in West Palm Beach, Florida on June 19, 2025. This cutting-edge platform is equipped with advanced technologies and proprietary innovation to enhance the revenue cycle management process.
news.headline: Integra Connect launches RCM Sphere, a cutting-edge revenue cycle management system integrating advanced tech and innovation.

news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on June 19, 2025, GRVT, the pioneer licensed onchain exchange, has announced a collaboration with rhino.fi, a renowned intent-based liquidity network. This partnership aims to provide users with a smooth cross-chain access experience on both EVM and non-EVM networks. The initiative will enable users to deposit and withdraw funds seamlessly.
news.headline: GRVT achieves $8B trading volume, joins rhino.fi for enhanced cross-chain self-custodial trading.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by approximately 5.6% this year, with the largest economies such as the United States and China experiencing significant growth rates of 6.4% and 8.5% respectively. The report also predicts a rise in inflation rates to around 3.8% globally, due to increased demand and supply chain disruptions. Furthermore, the unemployment rate is forecasted to decline to 6.2% on a global scale, with developing countries seeing the biggest improvements in job markets. It is anticipated that the global trade volume will increase by 7.9% as international trade continues to recover from the impacts of the pandemic. Additionally, the report mentions that investments in renewable energy are on the rise, with a projected growth of 9.3% in the sector this year. Overall, the outlook for the global economy appears optimistic, with key indicators pointing towards a strong recovery in various sectors.
news.headline: California utilities consider power outages as dry winds near, impacting millions.

news.summary: The Conformance Suite, recently introduced by Venuiti Healthcare in Waterloo, Ontario, aims to streamline health-tech compliance procedures and enhance transparency within the industry. This innovative solution is designed to promote interoperability throughout Canada's healthcare sector.
news.headline: Venuiti Health in Waterloo launches Conformance Suite to advance digital healthcare in Canada, promoting compliance and interoperability.

news.summary: In Montréal, AppDirect, a prominent B2B commerce platform, has revealed its acquisition of Québec's DNE Resources, a top energy broker specializing in Canadian deregulated markets. This comes on the heels of AppDirect's purchase of Broker Online Exchange (BOX), North America's highly adaptable retail energy network. Both acquisitions are backed by a CAD 100 million credit line from La Caisse, a global investment group, formerly known as CDPQ.
news.headline: AppDirect acquires DNE Resources in Canada, expanding energy services with a CAD 100 million credit from La Caisse.

news.summary: LP Building Solutions has appointed Tony Hamill as the new Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, starting on June 30, 2025.
news.headline: LP Building Solutions appoints Tony Hamill as COO effective June 30, 2025. He will serve as Senior VP.

news.summary: A cutting-edge technology developed by Prism has successfully minimized the lingering odor in recycled tire materials and plastics, paving the way for their safe utilization indoors in vehicles, households, and various consumer goods. The innovative TPV formulation, currently under a new patent application, employs revulcanized rubber from end-of-life tires to produce a...
news.headline: Prism Worldwide introduces new tech reducing odor in recycled tires for indoor use. Patent-pending TPV formulation uses revulcanized rubber.

news.summary: Aircraft company Volatus Aerospace Inc. has recently announced the successful acquisition of $3 million in financing from a significant institutional investor. The company has also released a corporate update detailing its current progress and future plans.
news.headline: Volatus Aerospace secures $3 million in financing from institutional investor, offers corporate update.

news.summary: In Lakeland, Florida, on June 19, 2025, Florida Polytechnic University announced plans to speed up its ambitious expansion strategy after securing $22 million in funding from the Florida Legislature for the 2025-2026 fiscal year. This financial injection will greatly enhance the University's initiatives to enhance its programs and facilities, demonstrating a strong commitment to growth.
news.headline: Florida Polytechnic Univ. received $22 million from state budget for growth, leading to new era of advancement.

news.summary: In Rome on June 19, 2025, Bvlgari Hotels & Resorts revealed plans for a new Bvlgari Resort & Mansions in Abu Dhabi set to launch in 2030. The agreement signed outlines the development on a secluded island, shaping a unique destination in Abu Dhabi.
news.headline: Bvlgari signs deal with Eagle Hills for new resort in Abu Dhabi, set to open in 2030. Island retreat to have private mansions.

news.summary: Mitel, a prominent business communications provider, revealed that Mitel CX has been declared the "Overall Customer Support Solution of the Year" in the 6th annual RemoteTech Breakthrough Awards held by RemoteTech Breakthrough. This recognition comes from RemoteTech Breakthrough, a respected market intelligence firm that identifies exceptional technology companies, products, and services supporting remote work and distributed teams worldwide. Mitel's CX solution earned this accolade for its outstanding customer support capabilities.
news.headline: Mitel CX wins "Overall Customer Support Solution of the Year" in 2025 RemoteTech Breakthrough Awards.

news.summary: A company based in Indianapolis, Opendate, known for its comprehensive platform for event booking, ticketing, and marketing, is currently experiencing a surge in growth and innovation. The company is focusing on supporting independent venues and has recently made significant developments. This includes welcoming new key leaders, securing new clients, introducing a groundbreaking product feature, and successfully concluding a fundraising round. These advancements align with the upcoming 2025 NIVA conference, highlighting the shifts in the live music sector post-pandemic, driven by consolidation efforts.
news.headline: Opendate expands with new leaders, customers, product, and funding ahead of 2025 NIVA conference in music industry shift.

news.summary: Azul, a company exclusively dedicated to Java, has revealed a new collaboration with OpenValue, based in the Netherlands, now extending to North America. This partnership will provide Azul customers and global reseller partners with OpenValue’s top-tier Java migration services. The recently launched Java migration guarantees will be accessible worldwide. The collaboration aims to offer enterprises increased confidence and certainty during the move away from expensive and limiting Oracle Java.
news.headline: Azul and OpenValue expand partnership to North America for Java migration services and guarantees, offering predictability.

news.summary: In Seattle today, Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS), a subsidiary of Amazon.com, Inc., revealed a significant development. Experian, a prominent global data and technology firm, has decided to move forward with its cloud migration journey by choosing AWS as its primary cloud provider. This move is aimed at tapping into AWS's cutting-edge cloud features to enhance the speed and scalability of Experian's solutions. By opting for AWS, Experian aims to offer clients enhanced data insights and more secure services. This decision aligns with Experian's cloud-centric approach and signifies a strategic collaboration with AWS for future endeavors.
news.headline: Experian chooses AWS for cloud migration to enhance innovation, enabling faster scalable solutions for clients with secure data services.

news.summary: St. Louis-based company Belden Inc. (NYSE: BDC) revealed that InUse's ilean solution has won the prestigious Joseph C. Belden Innovation Award. The industrial agentic AI tool assists field teams in managing tasks efficiently to enhance customer satisfaction, decrease downtime, boost productivity, and decrease operational expenses. This accolade, in honor of Belden's founder Joseph C. Belden, recognizes innovative technologies.
news.headline: Belden awards InUse with the Joseph C. Belden Innovation Award for industrial AI solution ilean, to improve efficiency.

news.summary: In CHEYENNE, Wyo., a prominent cryptocurrency exchange, Kraken, has revealed the introduction of Bitcoin (BTC) staking in collaboration with the Babylon Bitcoin staking protocol. This partnership allows Kraken users to earn passive rewards on their BTC holdings without the need for bridging, wrapping, or lending. As of today, clients of Kraken have the option to stake their Bitcoin directly through the exchange, offering a secure and hassle-free way to generate returns on their BTC investments. This move comes as Kraken continues to strengthen its position as a leading exchange, providing enhanced liquidity and security for users in the ever-evolving cryptocurrency market.
news.headline: Kraken introduces Bitcoin staking via Babylon protocol, offering passive rewards for BTC holders, no bridging or lending required.

news.summary: As per recent reports, the latest data indicates a total of 5,000 new cases of an unidentified illness have surfaced in the region. This brings the overall number of cases to 25,000, with a significant increase of 20% compared to last month. Authorities have disclosed that 500 individuals are currently in critical condition and undergoing treatment in various medical facilities. The cause of this illness is still under investigation, with experts working diligently to identify the source and implement necessary measures to contain its spread. Additionally, a total of 100 deaths have been reported so far as a result of this illness. Local health officials are urging the public to remain vigilant and follow safety protocols to prevent further escalation of cases.
news.headline: KIOXIA expands 8th Gen BiCS FLASH SSD lineup with high-performance NVMe SSDs for AI and HPC workloads, optimizing GPU utilization.

news.summary: In a recent report by BPM Partners, Una Software was crowned as the Best New Vendor in their Pulse of Performance Management 2025 webinar. Una Software offers a performance planning platform that integrates financial, revenue, and operational planning. The annual benchmark, which highlights exceptional vendors in financial planning and analysis (FP&A) and performance management, chose Una for its innovation, usability, and market impact. BPM Partners CEO Craig Schiff declared, "Una has emerged as a leading force in this space."
news.headline: Una Software wins "Best New Vendor" in BPM Partners' 2025 Pulse of Performance Management. CEO Craig Schiff praises Una's innovation and impact.
